p.strong: Which functions can be called from a signal handler without risking deadlock or corruption

g.text: ✓ SAFE: Raw syscalls, atomic ops, signal-specific functions
✗ UNSAFE: Buffered I/O, heap allocation, locks, atexit handlers
⚠ Heap lock held by interrupted code
⚠ May use static buffers or locks
